hero.label: The Definitive MX-5 Encyclopedia
hero.subtitle: Four generations. Hundreds of special editions. One obsession. The most comprehensive resource on the world's best-selling roadster.

buying_guide.title: Buying Guide
buying_guide.desc: What to look for, common problems by generation, price ranges, and the definitive checklist before you buy your first (or next) MX-5.

mods.title: Mods & Tuning
mods.desc: From coilovers to turbo kits. Every popular modification documented with real-world results, costs, and installation difficulty.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Service intervals, common failure points, DIY guides, and part numbers. Everything to keep your roadster on the road.

motorsport.title: Motorsport
motorsport.desc: Spec Miata, Global MX-5 Cup, autocross builds, and track day prep. The MX-5's racing heritage documented.

search.heading: Find anything about the MX-5
search.subtitle: Search across all generations, editions, modifications, and guides
